title: agent.session.heartbeat v1
description: Periodic liveness signal from a registered coding-agent session. Emitted on every Nth tool call OR every 60s (whichever first; cadence per-CLI in SKILL.md). Federates onto pane_id_qualified (primary, durable) and session_id (secondary, Claude-specific). Source: per-CLI session bridge (claude-session-bridge, opencode-session-bridge, etc.).

pane_id_qualified.description: Primary durable key: 'zellij:<session_name>:<pane_id>' or 'tmux:<pane_id>'. Survives compaction and Claude session_id changes. Optional only because non-pane CLIs may not have it; producers SHOULD set it whenever a tmux/zellij pane exists.

session_id.description: Secondary key. Claude Code transcript session_id, or the CLI's native session identifier.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp at the moment the heartbeat was emitted.

healthy.description: True if the agent is making forward progress (no stuck loops, no crashed subagents, recent tool activity). False signals the session is alive but degraded.

agent_type.description: Which coding CLI is running. Matches agent.session.v1 'agent' enum.

focus_bead.description: Current bead id the session is working (e.g. 'nervous-bus-ql7g'). Null/absent if no bead claimed.

subagents_in_flight.description: Count of dispatched-but-not-finished subagents/loomies/Task tool calls.

recent_tool_calls.description: Last N tool names invoked (typically last 5). Names only, no arguments — keeps the bus event small.

context_percent.description: Fraction of the model's context window currently used, as a percentage. 0 if unknown.

parent_main_session_id.description: If this session is linked (peer/subordinate/council-member), the session_id of the 'main' anchor session. Null/absent for solo sessions.
